achievements.title: Axis Lunar Mining Colony
achievements.description: Complete the first mission.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Asteroid Defense Forces & Orbital Hideout
achievements.description: Complete the second mission.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Arc Nova
achievements.description: Successfully complete the third mission.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Stratospheric Showdown
achievements.description: Complete the fourth mission.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Madagascar Shuttle Port
achievements.description: Successfully complete the fifth mission.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Axis Prime Minister's Mining Hideout
achievements.description: Complete the sixth mission.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: The Axis Capital
achievements.description: Complete the seventh and final mission.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Assault Suit Savant
achievements.description: Complete the game and get the good ending without using any continues and without using the Napalm.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: The War Is Over
achievements.description: Complete the game with the good ending, settling this war once and for all.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Private Army
achievements.description: Upgrade all 4 of the main weapons to L3 in a single playthrough.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Gatling Guru
achievements.description: Upgrade the Vulcan to L3.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Iron-Knuckled Knight
achievements.description: Upgrade the Punch to L3.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Homing Harrier
achievements.description: Upgrade the Missile to L3.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Lightshow Leader
achievements.description: Upgrade the Laser to L3.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Unparalleled Performance
achievements.description: Complete the game with at least 1,000,000 points. Is it really possible?!
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Stock-Weapon Specialist
achievements.description: Complete the game and get the good ending without acquiring any new weapons.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Glorified Flamethrower
achievements.description: Complete the first mission without scoring any non-mandatory points and unlock the Napalm.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Pacifist to Pyromaniac
achievements.description: Upgrade the Napalm to L3 - yes, it is possible!
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Insect Exterminator
achievements.description: Completely destroy the tunneler in the sixth mission within a single emergence and without using the Napalm.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Staying Cool While Burning Up
achievements.description: Destroy 11 Assault Suits while falling back to Earth in the fourth mission without using the Napalm.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Never Turn Back
achievements.description: Navigate the interior of Arc Nova in the third mission without pressing left.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Exceeding Expectations
achievements.description: Complete the game with at least 900,000 points.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Picking Drones off the Queen Bee
achievements.description: Destroy 14 winged Assault Suits in the fifth mission without letting the shuttle escape and without using the Napalm.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Radical Rocketeer
achievements.description: Navigate the asteroid belt in the second mission without taking damage.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: The Flawless Beatdown
achievements.description: Defeat Beldark in the final battle in the seventh mission without taking damage and without using the Napalm.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: No-Hit, 1-Round Knockout
achievements.description: Defeat Beldark in City Hall in the seventh mission using only the Punch, without taking damage, and without destroying either of his pods.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Deionized Destruction
achievements.description: Complete the game and get the good ending without using your shield and without using the Napalm.
achievements.author: Hyrax

achievements.title: Jake Brain's Cheat Sheet
achievements.description: Hold Up, L, and R on the title screen and press Start for 3 extra continues - allowed for all achievements.
achievements.author: kdecks
